user_claim: Customer: I spilled water near my laptop while working. | Support: What part was affected? | Customer: It went over the keys and left a stain. Some keys feel sticky now. | Support: Is the display damaged too? | Customer: No, this is about the keyboard area only.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The image clearly shows water on the keyboard area of the laptop, which aligns with the user's claim of spilling water over the keys.
claim_status_justification: img_1 shows water present on the keyboard area of the laptop, which aligns with the user's claim of spilling water over the keys. The damage is consistent with the claim and clearly visible.
